owner_required_signoff.decision: Review the merge spot-check machine pre-audit and the sampled human verdict, then explicitly record the owner sign-off status.
Review the taxonomy audit machine pre-audit and the sampled human verdict, then explicitly record the owner sign-off status.
Review the score audit machine pre-audit and the sampled human verdict, then explicitly record the owner sign-off status.
Review the attention audit machine pre-audit and the sampled human verdict, then explicitly record the owner sign-off status.
Review the unresolved audit machine pre-audit and the sampled human verdict, then explicitly record the owner sign-off status.
Apply the final merge/release judgment under DEC-025 and DEC-029 after reviewing the audit package, sampled human verdicts, and unresolved items.

rationale: GitHub remains the only current-phase live candidate discovery path, matching the frozen source boundary.
DEC-029 freezes Product Hunt as deferred for the current Phase1 exit gate while preserving the official GraphQL plus token-auth future live seam.
Local mart-backed dashboard reconciliation currently passes all materialized checks.

The five release audits now follow a structured machine_pre_audit -> human_sampled_verdict -> owner_signoff workflow, so machine output can only be conditional-go or no-go until owner approval is recorded.
Merge spot-check currently has no materialized merge-risk cases in the local baseline, so the release package records the empty-case baseline explicitly through the assigned sampled review pack.
DEC-025 keeps final merge/release sign-off with the owner, and the current report includes that recorded owner decision alongside the audit evidence.
